entities.name: GREEN WATER
entities.description: Water derived from precipitation that is stored in the soil and available for plant uptake

entities.name: BLUE WATER
entities.description: Liquid water found in rivers, lakes, and aquifers, used for irrigation

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Agricultural system relying solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: FULL IRRIGATION
entities.description: Agricultural system relying on artificial water supply systems

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Geographical regions characterized by low and erratic rainfall and high temperatures

entities.name: IWMI
entities.description: The International Water Management Institute, an organization focusing on water-related research

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization focusing on agricultural research in semi-arid regions

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia where joint research on watershed management is conducted

entities.name: WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of guiding and organizing the use of land and water resources in a watershed

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where collaboration on water management is envisioned

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A region in Asia where collaboration on water management is envisioned
